name: Burnt eggplant with garlic, lemon & pomegranate seeds

ingredients.item: 4 large eggplants (3¼ lb / 1.5 kg before cooking; 2½ cups / 550 g after burning and draining the flesh)
ingredients.original: 4 large eggplants (3¼ lb / 1.5 kg before cooking; 2½ cups / 550 g after burning and draining the flesh)

ingredients.item: grated zest of 1 lemon and 2 tbsp freshly squeezed lemon juice
ingredients.original: grated zest of 1 lemon and 2 tbsp freshly squeezed lemon juice

ingredients.item: seeds of ½ large pomegranate (scant ½ cup / 80 g in total)
ingredients.original: seeds of ½ large pomegranate (scant ½ cup / 80 g in total)
